base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rolento — a character (boss) from 1989 final fight. Rolento — Stage 3 boss, red-beret commando. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rolento — Stage 3 boss, red-beret commando; baton + grenades. Became SF Alpha/Zero fighter
